description_long: This is a detached suburban house with a prominent dark gable roof and white exterior siding. The front features a covered porch with columns, a double garage, and a paved driveway flanked by manicured shrubs and trees. The backyard is enclosed by a wooden fence and includes a patio area with outdoor furniture and a small play structure. Windows are symmetrically arranged on the front and rear facades, with large panes providing ample natural light. The house sits on a green lawn with landscaped pathways leading to the entry and around the property. The overall design is reminiscent of modern American Colonial or Cape Cod styles, blending traditional and contemporary elements.
description: A white, gable-roofed suburban house with a covered front porch, double garage, and fenced backyard featuring a patio and play area. Symmetrical windows and manicured landscaping complete its classic, inviting appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, double garage, main entry, driveway, and landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and partial backyard with trees and fencing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the fenced backyard, patio area, play structure, and symmetrical rear windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side wall, windows, and a clear view of the backyard fence and landscaping.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with columns, central steps, and a single main door flanked by windows.
